title: Baidyanath is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Baidyanath is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
